title: stylocoryna malabarica
intro: Stylocoryna malabarica is a type of flowering plant, also known as the Malabar nut, that belongs to the family Simaroubaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and pain, and is also used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Stylocoryna malabarica can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic medicine to support overall health and well-being.
